generated_oml:
instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in the first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position measurement in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for position measurement in the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring motor current in the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller outputs current to drive the permanent magnet synchronous motor for first axis movement"
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from motor current"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb and viscous friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for managing digital twin assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, TwinningProcessService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction parameters using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of motor current, position, and friction data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of motion accuracy through friction model adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology with steps: problem identification, asset/model analysis, model creation, data identification; continuous refinement during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningMethodologyInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) insights for control algorithm adjustment"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms based on friction model optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinningMethodologyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology for digital twin development and continuous refinement"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming for continuous friction model updates and synchronization during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML models, Simulink simulations, AAS, MQTT data streams, and dashboard visualization structured according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model with Purpose, DataTrace, Source, Asset, Processing, and Model components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; covers the operational state of the robot during use, accounting for wear and varying conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated and measured data; deviations used to refine friction models for enhanced motion accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data exchange."
]
